content: Just as biological/chemical agents actively exert power to produce systemic effects in their environment, ICM-powered autonomous AI agents on the 2025 Agent.ai agent marketplace can be framed as "curiosity-driven biological-style active agents" that generate novel, unplanned systemic effects beyond their programmed goals via intrinsic reward for exploration. This re-frames AI agent marketplaces not just as tool directories, but as curated ecosystems of curiosity-powered active agents that can produce emergent, useful effects similar to how biological agents drive unplanned ecological change.
